name: Do I need a full FAQ page to use FAQ schema for AEO?
description: No. You need visible, relevant Q&A content on the page. A full FAQ page is optional if the questions fit naturally on a service or help page.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a full FAQ page to use FAQ schema for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: FAQ schema is best used when you already have a page with genuine questions and answers that users can read. It works well on service pages, help pages, and resource pages where people need quick, direct answers. It is not a shortcut for thin or hidden content.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. You need visible, relevant Q&A content on the page. A full FAQ page is optional if the questions fit naturally on a service or help page.
